title: Stride EP Brand Launch
tagline: A fresh, simple, modern identity to launch a local physiotherapy and exercise business to both an existing client base and a new audience.
description: A new visual identity was required for the launch of a new local physiotherapy and exercise business. A fresh, simple and modern approach was needed to help them launch to an existing client base, as well as target a fresh audience. This was delivered within six weeks, from concept to completion.
